sections.heading: Product Description
sections.text:
Discover the timeless power of Clear Quartz, often called the “Master Healer” of the crystal world. Revered for centuries, this crystal is believed to amplify energy, cleanse negativity, and bring harmony to both mind and body. 

Wearing this bracelet not only adds a touch of elegance to your style but also acts as a daily reminder to stay centered, focused, and positive. Whether you’re seeking clarity in decision-making, emotional balance, or simply a beautiful accessory that resonates with energy and intention, the Clear Quartz Bracelet is a perfect companion for your wellness journey.

sections.heading: Product Details
sections.text:
Energy Amplification: Enhances and amplifies personal energy and intentions.

Mental Clarity: Supports focus, concentration, and clear decision-making.

Emotional Balance: Promotes inner harmony, reduces stress, and stabilizes emotions.

Holistic Wellbeing: Encourages overall wellness by aligning mind, body, and spirit.

Versatile Elegance: Complements any attire while serving as a subtle energy accessory.

sections.heading: Hero Ingredients
sections.text:
Clear Quartz Crystal - Known for clarity, positivity, focus, healing, and energy amplification.

Natural Crystal Beads - Transparent beads with natural crystal shine and subtle variations.

Stretchable Bracelet Base - Comfortable, flexible, and easy to wear daily.

sections.heading: Product Benefits
sections.text:
✨ Supports Clear Thinking

Helps bring mental clarity, focus, and a more organized state of mind.

🔮 Amplifies Intentions

Clear Quartz crystal is known for strengthening personal intentions, manifestation, and energy work.

🌿 Balances Energy

Supports a cleaner, lighter, and more balanced energy flow in daily life.

🧘 Helps in Meditation

Useful for meditation, prayer, mindfulness, and spiritual routines.

💎 Easy Everyday Crystal

Its clean transparent look makes it simple, premium, and suitable for daily styling.

sections.heading: How to Use
sections.text:
Wear the bracelet on your left hand, as it is the receiving hand for positive energy and abundance.

Keep it close to your skin for continuous crystal benefits throughout the day.
